messages.content:
Good morning, Dr. Reyes. I've completed your **pre-review briefing** for Study **ABC-2024-001**.

Since your last session on **Nov 14**, I've detected **3 new data updates**. The **Discrepancy Triage Agent** has pre-processed them and found **3 anomalies** — 2 CRITICAL, 1 HIGH — awaiting your review.

The **Query Resolution Agent** has drafted query text and is ready for your approval. How would you like to proceed?

prompts: What changed since my last review?

messages.content: Show me the anomalies in the new data.
ML anomaly detection (Module 6) has flagged **3 findings** with high confidence:

prompts: Raise discrepancies on all flagged items

messages.content: What changed since my last review?
Since your last review on **Nov 14, 2024**, I've identified **3 data updates** across 2 subjects:
messages.footer: The **Discrepancy Triage Agent** has pre-processed all 3. **2 require your immediate attention.**

messages.content: What is our milestone readiness status?

risks.title: Open Discrepancies
risks.detail: 8 open discrepancies remain. Target at lock: 0. At current resolution rate (2/day), 4 discrepancies will remain unresolved at lock date.

risks.title: Site 02 Completeness
risks.detail: Site 02 data completeness at 89% (threshold: 95%). 3 outstanding visits. Site data manager notified on Nov 15.

onTrack: Visit completion rate: 91% (6 of 8 subjects complete)
assessment.recommendation: Recommended: escalate Site 02 by Nov 18; prioritize CRITICAL discrepancy resolution this week.

prompts: Raise discrepancies on all flagged items

messages.content: Write a patient narrative for SUBJ-003.

messages.narrative:
PATIENT NARRATIVE — SUBJ-003
Female, age 38, enrolled in Study ABC-2024-001 (Treatment A arm) at Site 02 on Day –14. Subject had a prior history of depression (ongoing, Sertraline) and resolved migraine.

On Day 7, the subject reported onset of SEVERE headache, assessed by the investigator as RELATED to the study drug. Concurrent SEVERE vomiting was reported on Day 9. Both events persisted through Days 21 and 15 respectively.

prompts: Raise discrepancies on all flagged items

messages.content: Show me the drafted queries for approval.
The **Query Resolution Agent** has drafted **2 queries** based on the flagged anomalies. These are ready for your review before submission to EDC:

drafts.title: ALT Elevation — Hepatotoxicity Assessment Required
drafts.text: ALT value of 72 U/L (1.8× ULN) recorded at Day 30. Please confirm lab result accuracy and provide hepatotoxicity assessment. Has the subject shown any clinical symptoms of liver injury?

drafts.title: Hy's Law Criteria — Causality Review
drafts.text: ALT 115 U/L + AST 105 U/L at Day 45 (final observation). Subject deceased (Disease Progression). Please provide Hy's Law assessment and confirm causality determination.

auditUpdate.text: **Query Resolution Agent** drafts reviewed by Dr. Reyes

messages.content: ✓ Approved. Save narrative to SUBJ-003 record.

✓ **Narrative saved and attached to SUBJ-003's record.**

It is now accessible from the subject's Patient Profile and will be included in the next data extract. Audit trail updated.
